subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast believed in God and attested to His words! The standard of the Covenant is raised in the heart of the world, and its banner [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من آمن بالله و صدق بکلمات الله علم میثاق در قطب جهان بلند است و پرچمش از
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @call to action
